query:
SELECT c.id, c.spaceId, c.contractId, cs.id as contract_space_id 
FROM contracts_with_space c 
LEFT JOIN contract_spaces cs ON c.spaceId = cs.id 
WHERE cs.id IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user r9CVoJ25nh9Ssfd.root --database Ztp8T7Vpr2FQpGULvKFpsw --execute SELECT c.id, c.spaceId, c.contractId, cs.id as contract_space_id 
FROM contracts_with_space c 
LEFT JOIN contract_spaces cs ON c.spaceId = cs.id 
WHERE cs.id IS NULL;
